title: Request Access
intro_description: Use this form for Sandbox access, course assistants, tool pilots, workshops, or consultations with the CUNY AI Lab. Including details about the specific course, project, or audience helps us respond.
features: CAIL Sandbox access for teaching, research, or staff work
Course-specific assistants built around syllabi and readings
Tool pilots for media processing, accessibility, web publishing, or research workflows
Workshops and consultations for CUNY units

campus.label: CUNY College/Campus
campus.placeholder: e.g., Graduate Center, Hunter College, Baruch

intended_use.label: Intended Use
intended_use.placeholder: Describe what you want CAIL to help with, including the course, project, or workflow involved.

tools_of_interest.label: Specific Tools or Support of Interest (Optional)

privacy_note: We use your information only to process your access request and provide support. The CUNY AI Lab follows CUNY's privacy policies and uses zero-retention practices.

next_steps.title: Review
next_steps.description: We review your request within 2-3 business days.

next_steps.title: Response
next_steps.description: We reply with the likely next step.

next_steps.title: Access or meeting
next_steps.description_html: That may be Sandbox access, a consultation, or a pilot conversation.

next_steps.title: Support
next_steps.description: We help match the request to the right tool or workflow.

questions_text: Have questions before submitting the form?
questions_link_text: Contact the CUNY AI Lab Team →
